name: Signature Espresso
description: Double-shot single origin espresso with a rich, velvety crema.

name: Velora Cold Brew
description: Slow-steeped for 18 hours, served over ice with a splash of oat cream.

name: Golden Hour Latte
description: Espresso, steamed milk, and a hint of saffron-honey syrup.

name: Cardamom Cortado
description: Equal parts espresso and warm milk, finished with cardamom dust.

name: Jasmine Silver Needle
description: Delicate white tea hand-picked and scented with fresh jasmine blossom.

name: Spiced Chai Reserve
description: Assam black tea slow-brewed with cinnamon, clove, and star anise.

name: Matcha Ceremonial
description: Stone-ground ceremonial grade matcha whisked to a silky foam.

name: Dark Chocolate Fondant
description: Warm molten chocolate cake with a scoop of vanilla bean gelato.

name: Basque Burnt Cheesecake
description: Caramelized crust, impossibly creamy center, sea salt finish.

name: Pistachio Rose Tart
description: Buttery tart shell, pistachio frangipane, rose petal glaze.

name: Golden Croissant Benedict
description: Flaky croissant, poached eggs, hollandaise, smoked salmon.

name: Velora Avocado Toast
description: Sourdough, whipped avocado, chili oil, soft egg, microgreens.

name: Belgian Waffle Stack
description: Caramelized waffles, mascarpone, seasonal fruit compote.

name: Truffle Mushroom Risotto
description: Arborio rice, wild mushrooms, black truffle, aged parmesan.

name: Charred Citrus Salmon Bowl
description: Grilled salmon, quinoa, charred citrus, herb yogurt.

name: Roasted Vegetable Grain Bowl
description: Farro, roasted seasonal vegetables, tahini, pomegranate.

name: Slow-Braised Short Rib
description: 48-hour braise, red wine jus, roasted root vegetables.

name: Pan-Seared Sea Bass
description: Crispy skin sea bass, saffron beurre blanc, fennel.

name: Wild Mushroom Wellington
description: Puff pastry, wild mushroom duxelles, truffle jus.

name: Rose Yuzu Spritz
description: Sparkling yuzu, rose water, fresh mint, soda.

name: Velora Iced Tonic
description: House cold brew tonic with citrus oils and orange peel.

name: Golden Hour Old Fashioned
description: Bourbon, saffron-honey syrup, orange bitters, smoked glass.

name: Velora Espresso Martini
description: Vodka, fresh espresso, coffee liqueur, vanilla bean.

name: Amber Fig Negroni
description: Gin, sweet vermouth, fig-infused Campari, orange twist.
